zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter de Warburton I於1364年出生時，他的父親John de Warburton II26歲，母親Agnes de Wevers27歲。他於1394年與Alice de Braylesford結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1421年享年57歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Warburton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Greater Manchester (formerly in Cheshire) called Warburton, from the Old English female personal name Wǣrburg (composed of the elements wǣr ‘pledge’ + burh ‘fortress’) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Warbritton
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Warburton  . This form of the surname is not found in English sources.

variants.name: Warbington
meanings: English (Lancashire): perhaps a variant of   Warburton  ; otherwise a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter de Warburton I was born in 1364, his father, John de Warburton II, was 26 and his mother, Agnes de Wevers, was 27. He married Alice de Braylesford in 1394. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1421, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter de Warburton I est né en 1364, son père, John de Warburton II, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Wevers, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Braylesford en 1394. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1421, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peter de Warburton I 1364 geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Warburton II 26 und seine Mutter Agnes de Wevers 27. Er hat 1394 Alice de Braylesford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1421 im Alter von 57 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Peter de Warburton I è nato il nel 1364, il suo padre, John de Warburton II, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Wevers, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Braylesford nel 1394. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1421, all'età di 57 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Peter de Warburton I(이)가 1364년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Warburton II(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Wevers(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1394년 Alice de Braylesford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1421년 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter de Warburton I nasceu em 1364, seu pai, John de Warburton II, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Wevers, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Braylesford em 1394. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1421, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter de Warburton I родился в 1364 г., его отцу по имени John de Warburton II было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Wevers, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Braylesford в 1394 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1421 г. в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peter de Warburton I nació en 1364, su papá, John de Warburton II, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agnes de Wevers, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Alice de Braylesford en 1394. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1421, a la edad de 57 años.
